data.name: 聖女艾露娜與墮淫之書〜爆乳修女的色情使命〜
data.detailed_description:
【劇情】

修女・艾露娜無意間解放了封印在洞窟中的「淫魔・蕾妮絲」。

即便艾露娜被她的同事修女・埃菈所救，被釋放的淫魔仍然留在她的體內……

要抵抗受到淫魔影響而不斷湧出的性慾的話，就得喝下抑制淫魔的「特殊春藥」。

她必須一邊忍住副作用影響下引起的性慾，一邊撐過「七天」。

但村裡的變態男人們怎麼可能會放過臉頰通紅的爆乳修女呢……

艾露娜即將開始淫慾纏身的七天……

 

【作品特徵】

內心溫柔的修女「艾露娜」，與身為第二女主，阿多斯村教會中的修女「埃菈」。

兩位修女要一邊忍住受到淫魔影響滿溢而出的「淫慾」，一邊完成自己的職責。

以再次封印淫魔為目標「忍住春藥的影響，拼命忍耐絕不做色色之事的修女短篇RPG」。

・擅自定居在村莊裡，試圖靠近艾露娜的無家可歸中年男。

・研發催○藥，經營鍊金店的詭異中年男。

・糾纏不休地勸著不會喝酒的艾露娜喝酒的酒吧老闆年輕男人。

・作為幫助故鄉村莊的報酬，要求艾露娜身體的老村長。

……等等，被困在男人們對豐滿肉體的慾望漩渦中的同時，捲進圍繞著阿多斯村莊的事件。

 

◼︎色情語音

女主角的艾露娜以及埃菈擁有數十種帶動H情景的原創嬌喘聲。(CV:琴香　様)

※本作非全語音。
 

◼︎回想房間

內含處女通關、各個NPC的結局、壞結局等等。

除了複數的通關路線之外，遊戲裡也設有回想房間以及全開放開關。
 

◼︎性騷擾立繪

遊戲裡也提供了一些兒時玩伴的性騷擾立繪！

還有可能會被主要的竿角以及路人NPC性騷擾……！
 

◼︎陰毛切換設定

遊戲裡設有切換陰毛的設定，只要有做切換就會反應在全部的基本CG以及立繪上！

不管什麼時候都能變更設定，想要體驗成熟氛圍的玩家請務必試試！

 

 
◼︎特定對象的結尾

遊戲裡有為做為主要竿角的NPC設置結尾房間。

在結尾房間中，有描繪結局後的竿角與女主角，可以遊走在與竿角相關聯的場所，與NPC進行對話，

享受與竿角墮落後的H事件等等。

 

【系統】

基本上是以探索事件為主題，以H事件為主的短篇RPG。

本作中，在一天的結束時，必須要在喝/不喝春藥中做出選擇。

喝下春藥的話，「淫慾等級」就會提升，雖然艾露娜因此必須要抵抗自己的性慾，但可以避免被淫魔操控身體。

選擇不喝的話，身體就會被淫魔所操控，如果連續好幾天都選擇不喝的話……

  

角色設有H狀態，會在H事件後產生變動。

也設有艾露娜的「狀態消息」系統！

本作中設有對應日期進展而上升的「淫慾等級」與伴隨著H事件發生而產生的「墮落程度」。

隨著淫慾等級的提升，墮落程度的上限也會增加，清純的艾露娜會變得越來越淫蕩……！
 

遊戲裡也能操作身為第二女主的修女・埃菈。

可以體驗到在艾露娜不在時所發生的事情。

如果不觸發任意H事件的話，埃菈身上並不會發生任何事情，但如果持續讓她觸發H事件的話……？
 

以兒時玩伴的乳牛泳裝為首，還準備了特別設計的服裝！

在本作中，各個竿役所使用的服裝大致上都已設定好，並且會在H事件中更好地發揮服裝的特色。

data.short_description: 某天，封印之書突然散發出光芒，強大的淫魔侵入到艾露娜的體內。 並且，如果要抑制體內的淫魔的話，似乎得持續飲用「春藥」才行…… 艾露娜到底能不能忍住春藥的藥效，從男人們以及淫魔手上守護住自己的純潔呢？
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Saintess Eruna and the Lustful Book of Corruption ~Busty Sister's H Services~
data.detailed_description:
【Story】

In Urunka village, there's a busty sister— Eruna.

One day, after receiving requests for assistance from other villages, she left her hometown and went to "Adus Village."

She was given the task of guarding the "Succubus Rhaenys" who had been sealed in the village cave since ancient times.

Eruna came to the cave and found an old book in the depths.

When Eruna approached, the book suddenly released eerie shine,

and the sealed succubus was freed.

Even though she tried resisting, the succubus still entered her body, almost possessing her.

Eruna was then saved by her fellow sister, Aela. However, the succubus still remained in her body...

Then, to resist the uprising desire under the influence of the succubus, she needs to drink “a special love potion that suppresses the succubus,”

next, she has to endure the horniness, which is the side effect of the love potions, for "Seven Days."

Of course the perverted men in the village will not let the busty sister have it easy...

Eruna is about to begin her lustful seven days...
  

【Features】

Eruna, a gentle and kind sister who fulfills her duties in a rural village

and the side character, Aela, a sister in the church of Adus Village.

The two sisters have to hold back the overflowing lust because of the succubus while fulfilling their duties

and seal the succubus again. "A short RPG about sisters enduring lust and avoid erotic things.

・The homeless middle-aged man who lives in the village without permission and always tries to approach Eruna.

・The weird middle-aged man who runs a alchemy store and develops H○rny potion.

・The young bar keeper who keeps making Eruna drink despite her inability to handle alcohol.

・The old village head who asked for Eruna's body as the payment of helping his village.

...etc, they are trapped in the lustful spiral and involved in the incident around Adus Village.

 

◼︎Moaning Sounds
There are tens of original moaning sounds of Eruna and Aela in H events and some short lines. (CV:琴香　様)

※This product is not fully dubbed.

 

◼︎Memory Room
Additionally, virgin clearing, endings of each NPC, bad endings, etc., besides multiple endings,

the game also has a Memory Room, Full-unlock switch,

and quality of life features such as objective indicators and Heart marks for H events locations, making your playthrough smooth and easy!

 

◼︎Sexual Harassment Illustrations
The game offers some sexual harassment illustrations of childhood playmates!

As well as the sexual harassment of the main male characters and passer-by NPCs...!

 

◼︎Switch pubic hair settings
Switch the pubic hair settings and it applies to all basic CGs and illustrations!

You can activate the switch at any time, please try it out if you like a more mature aura! 
 

◼︎Endings
This game has an ending room for the main male NPCs.

The ending room presents the afterword of the heroine and male NPCs, you can walk around the locations related to each NPC and talk to them

to enjoy the H Events after the heroine's corruption.

  

【System】

This is a short RPG built around exploration and H events.

At the end of every day, the player must decide to drink/not to drink the love potion.

Drinking the love potion will increase “Lust,” preventing Eruna from being possessed by the succubus at the cost of being horny and having to resist the sex drive.

Not drinking it will allow the succubus to take over Eruna's body completely. If she keeps that going for several days...

 

The character has H stats which will experience changes after H events.

There is also a “Stats Message” system for Eruna!

This game features “Lust” which increases as time progresses and “Corruption” which increases as H events take place.

As the Lust increases, the cap of the Corruption will increase, making the pure Eruna more and more lustful……!

 

You can also play as the side character Sister Aela to experience the events where Eruna is not present.

Nothing will happen to Aela if she doesn't go through any H events, but if H events continue to happen to her...?

 

Not only the cow costume of the childhood playmate, there are uniquely designed costumes!

In this game, the costumes used by each male character have been set, and the characteristics of the costumes will be better used in the H events.

data.short_description: One day, the sealed book suddenly exuded light, and a powerful succubus invaded Eruna's body. To suppress the succubus in her body, she has to keep taking “love potions”... Can Eruna resist the effect of the love potion and protect her purity from the men and the succubus?
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
